RLSPolicy(table_name='user_management', policy_name='user_management_complex_multi_condition_policy', policy_sql='
CREATE POLICY "user_management_complex_access" ON user_management
FOR ALL USING (
    -- Development bypass
    is_dev_mode() OR
    -- Service role override
    auth.role() = 'service_role'::text OR
    -- Organization-based access
    (organization_id IN (
        SELECT organization_id FROM user_management
        WHERE user_id = auth.uid()
    ) AND auth.uid() IS NOT NULL) OR
    -- Creator ownership
    created_by = auth.uid()
);
', pattern=<PolicyPattern.COMPLEX_MULTI_CONDITION: 'complex_multi_condition'>, risk_level=<RiskLevel.CRITICAL: 'critical'>, requires_testing=True, organization_id=None, dependencies=[], performance_impact=0.0, test_queries=[], rollback_sql=None, created_at=datetime.datetime(2026, 1, 13, 6, 8, 14, 340158), created_by='policy_generator', version='1.0')

CREATE POLICY "templates_complex_access" ON templates
FOR ALL USING (
    -- Development bypass
    is_dev_mode() OR
    -- Service role override
    auth.role() = 'service_role'::text OR
    -- Organization-based access
    (organization_id IN (
        SELECT organization_id FROM user_management
        WHERE user_id = auth.uid()
    ) AND auth.uid() IS NOT NULL) OR
    -- Creator ownership
    created_by = auth.uid()
);
